title: Pacific Biosciences (PACB) Stock Investors Activity & Sentiment
text: TipRanks data shows 1.8% of retail investors changed their holding of PACB in the last 30 days. Retail investors allocate an average of 2.65% to PACB, based on 738,563 active investor portfolios. PACB stock was up 29.55% as of late April 2026 for the month. However, Pacific Biosciences' current valuation based on AAII's Value Grade is a F, meaning it is considered to be Ultra Expensive. Retail investor interest in PACB appears relatively modest with low turnover rates. The stock has shown volatility but remains highly valued relative to its fundamentals, which may influence retail investor sentiment. The company faces a negative outlook due to anticipated decline in gross margins and concerns regarding stagnant utilization rates and weaker than expected demand for new instruments.
